untranslatable_reason: Abandoned Baby candlestick pattern requires multi-candle formation detection (three specific candlestick structures with gap conditions) which cannot be expressed using single-bar indicators and basic operators. The pattern requires: (1) downtrend context, (2) first candle with lower close, (3) second candle gap down with small body, (4) third candle gap up with higher close—this requires pattern recognition logic not available in the allowed indicator set.
translation_notes: Attempted to capture the essence using volume trend (rising volume via hvol_20) and upward breakout (close > prev_close), with exit on return to 20-day MA. However, the core pattern definition requires candlestick pattern recognition which is not supported by the allowed indicators. Author-silent parameters (success rates, exact stop/target rules) could not be translated. Consider implementing a dedicated candlestick pattern detector or providing explicit entry rules based on price levels and volume.
